title: mentha aquatica var. langii
intro: Mentha aquatica var. langii, also known as Lang's water mint, is a variety of water mint, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its essential oils, which contain compounds like menthol and limonene, known for their antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. langii include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and relieve pain, as well as its potential to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Mentha aquatica var. langii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
